seo.title: REVOLT | Official Site
seo.description: Discover the latest in fashion and essentials.

hero.title: The Uniform Collection
hero.description: Discover our latest foundational pieces, engineered for everyday movement and comfort.

sections.title: Our Ethos
sections.text: We believe in clothing that empowers you to move with confidence. Every seam, every fabric choice, is designed with purpose.
